title: AOMEES Adhesive Hooks Heavy Duty Wall Hooks 8kg (Max) Self Adhesive Hook 12pcs
features: 🔧 ‌Self Adhesive Hooks‌ Revolutionize Your Space! Our ‌strong stick on hooks‌ feature industrial-grade adhesive that holds up to 8kg without drilling. Perfect for ‌bathroom hooks self adhesive‌ needs, these ‌waterproof adhesive wall hooks‌ withstand steam & humidity while protecting surfaces with non-marking formula.

🏠 Multi-Surface Mastery! These ‌stick on hooks for hanging‌ work flawlessly on tiles, glass, wood & metal. Use as ‌self adhesive towel hooks‌ in kitchens, ‌key hooks self adhesive‌ in entryways, or ‌sticky wall hooks‌ for decor. The slim 60x60mm profile blends discreetly into any room aesthetic.

💪 Heavy-Duty Performance! Engineered with ‌sticky hooks extra strong‌ technology, the reinforced adhesive layer cures fully in 24hrs for maximum strength. Ideal for ‌stick on hooks heavy duty‌ tasks like holding bathrobes, cookware or tool belts with confidence.

🌧️ All-Weather Resilience! These ‌bathroom hooks‌ boast military-grade waterproofing that repels oil, moisture & heat up to 80℃. Easily clean ‌plastic hooks‌ surface with soapy water while the rust-proof coating maintains like-new appearance.

🎁 Complete Organization Kit! Get 12 PCS ‌small sticky hooks‌ with protective films & installation guide. Use as ‌wall hanging hooks‌ for plants, ‌self adhesive coat hooks‌ in closets, or creative ‌sticker hooks‌ for kids' artwork – all removable without residue!
description: Product Description Notice: 1. It is recommends not hanging articles that can be a hazard or of value from the hook. 2. It is not recommended for painted walls. 3.Normally on the smooth tile surface, this hook can hold up to 17.6 lb/ 8 kg. But we'd like to suggest no more than 13.2 lb/ 6 kg for holding a long time.
